category_sources: Official project page describes pkgdiff as a package change analysis tool.
source_facts.description: Tool for analyzing changes in software packages (e.g. RPM, DEB, TAR.GZ).
display_name_sources: Official project page title uses pkgdiff.
docs_sources: Official project page is the primary documentation surface and links to the source repository.
source_facts.homepage is the official pkgdiff project page.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/lvc/pkgdiff, so repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: Official project purpose is package difference analysis.
source_facts.description identifies analysis of changes in RPM, DEB, and TAR.GZ packages.
